testcase.name: runScenario

error.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element found by By.xpath: //table[@id='DataTables_Table_1']/tbody/tr[1]/td[1]/child::a to be clickable, but the element was not found: org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//table[@id='DataTables_Table_1']/tbody/tr[1]/td[1]/child::a"}.
